case_title: ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES VS. JIN HEE KIM et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT (RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, JIN HEE WOO, JONG DUK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET STREET, APARTMENT #1502, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JIN HEE WOO, JONG DUK DOES 1-V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JIN HEE WOO, JONG DUK
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JIN HEE WOO, JONG DUK
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JIN HEE WOO, JONG DUK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES SERVED JUN-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, JIN HEE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES SERVED JUN-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, JONG DUK
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $55.67 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES
